title: Discussion: Stress Management and Well-Being
prompt: Reflect on the research presented in Chapter 14 about stress, coping, and happiness. What was the most surprising finding you encountered? Choose one evidence-based stress management or happiness strategy discussed in the chapter and explain how it could be applied in a specific real-world context (e.g., college student life, healthcare, the workplace). Consider potential barriers to implementation and how they might be overcome. How does understanding the psychology of stress and well-being change how you think about your own health?
